name: Linguine"deliziose
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the linguine according to package instructions or make it fresh. Cool under cold running water and set aside.
2. Lightly flour the prawns and salmon.
3. In a large saute pan, heat olive oil over high heat. Add the prawns and salmon and saute for 1 minute.
4. Add leeks (one at a time) and mushrooms, then saute for 1 minute after each addition.
5. Add wine, marjoram, parsley, garlic, salt, pepper, and butter. Saute lightly for 1 minute.
6. Add broth and lower the heat. Simmer for 2 minutes, adding more broth if needed to prevent dryness.
7. Add the drained linguine and mix well. Simmer for an additional minute.
8. To serve, place the linguine on a plate first. Decorate with prawns, then pour the remaining sauce over both. Garnish with parsley.
